title: Minimal HUD
description: Alters the HUD to be much more minimal, making the game more immersive
body:
Simple resource pack that clears up the UI from useless clutter, making the game look much more immersive.

Inspired by the look of [microDurability](https://modrinth.com/mod/microdurability 'microDurability'), it is pretty much meant to be used alongside it. I also recommend getting a transparent UI texture pack like [this one](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/transparent-gui) for the full effect.

- the hotbar is fully transparent, and only the selected slot has an outline
- the health, food and experience meters have been changed to a simple line
- the armor meter is removed for a more minimal look, because it is pretty much useless outside of PVP (which this pack is not meant for)
- the air meter is still using bubbles because it looked better than a bar
